platform shall be adopted before the
mayoralty candidate is nominated.


In the nominating speeches, plans
have been laid for Frank Graves to
present the name of Mr. Rasher to
the convention. 1t is likely President
Smart of the trades council will NOM
mate Mayor Byrnc. Three or four
different persons have been spoken
of as possibilities for presenting the
name of Mr.. Jameson.


At Central Labor hall last night
the committee appointed to look after
registration reported last night that
more organized labor votes have reg
istered this year than ever before.
At the registration office in the city
hall this morning nearly 100 men
were in line when the doors opened
at o'clock and the line of men re-
manned unbroken all day. Indicating
the heaviest single days registration
in the history of the Office.


The republicans of the city are
getting busy for their caucuses to-
night.
